news.t: Defiance Expands Its Quantum Suite with QTUP, Targeting Early-Stage Quantum Companies

holdings.infoBox: QTUP is an equity ETF with a total of 21 individual holdings. The top holdings are IonQ, Inc. stock at 16.51%, Quantinuum at 16.48%, First American Government Obligations Fund at 14.69%, D-WAVE QUANTUM INC.-SWAP-MREX-L at 11.95%, and OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at 10.27%.

overview.description: The Defiance Long Pure Quantum ETF (QTUP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in companies with substantial exposure to quantum computing or machine learning activities. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation through a concentrated portfolio of companies involved in the development and application of quantum technologies. QTUP was launched on Jun 8, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.

data.title: Defiance Expands Its Quantum Suite with QTUP, Targeting Early-Stage Quantum Companies
data.text: MIAMI, June 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs, a leader in thematic and leveraged exchange-traded funds, today announced the launch of the Defiance Long Pure Quantum ETF (Cboe BZX: QTUP) , an...
